title: Zombie rush+
description: the mod adds new types of zombies that will make the game more difficult
body:
The mod adds:
zombie warlock, zombie knight, zombie golem, zombie special forces, snow zombie, zombie miner, just a zombie with a tie, zombie with a bucket on his head, electro zombie, zombie miner second?, zombie necromancer, zombie king, Zombie soldier tf2, just a zombie soldier, zombie cyborg, zombie with suicide vest, zombie crusader.

I am the creator of this mod and I declare it is raw!
it is not recommended to use it on the server since you can make a lag machine out of zombies (I will fix it)
and just a cool mod that adds quite complex and destructive mobs
mod made using mcreator!
